articles.author: John Towfighi, Chris Isidore
articles.title: Nasdaq drops 1% after China’s latest AI breakthrough rattles tech stocks - CNN
articles.description: Stocks in Asia and the United States fell Friday after technological advances announced by a Chinese artificial intelligence company intensified concerns that the AI spending spree driving this year’s market rally could be at risk.
